Bash(node -e "const data = require\('./node_modules/next/dist/compiled/@next/font/dist/google/font-data.json'\); const keys = Object.keys\(data\); console.log\(keys.filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('jakarta'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('outfit'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('geist'\)\)\)")
